config.title: Deneme
config.description:
We are looking for a Software Engineering Intern or Junior Developer with a solid background in backend development and AI integration. 

Key Responsibilities:
- Design and develop scalable API endpoints using Python, FastAPI or similar frameworks.
- Integrate large language models (LLMs) like OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, and DeepSeek to build intelligent application features.
- Build real-time systems, client-server architectures, or work with streaming protocols (RTSP/RTP).
- Optimize application latency, algorithms, and performance.
- Collaborate with frontend teams working on React, TypeScript, or JavaScript.

Requirements:
- Enrolled in or graduated from a Computer Engineering or related program.
- Good hands-on experience in Python or Java.
- Familiarity with web frameworks (FastAPI, React).
- Basic understanding of client-server networking (Sockets, TCP/IP).
- Passion for software optimization, image processing, or video streaming.
